title: WATCH:  Clintons' deposition tapes released by House Oversight Committee
fullText: Clintons' deposition tapes released by House Oversight CommitteeThe House Oversight Committee released video of the the Clintons' depositions as part of an inquiry into the federal government's handling of investigations into Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell.March 3, 2026
summary: The House Oversight Committee released video of the the Clintons' depositions as part of an inquiry into the federal government's handling of investigations into Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell.
